caption.text:
GOODMORNING BSB FAM! ☀️☀️☀️☀️☀️
Today’s live schedule will be 10:00am and 6:30pm! We would LOVE for yall to tune in and see all of our NEW styles from market! We will be featuring the brands listed above! See you soon! You don’t want to miss this! 🌊🩵⛱️ 

#30aarray #blacksheep #market #live

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by The Black Sheep Boutique in 30A. May be a graphic of towel, sweater, poster, palm trees and text that says 'TUESDAY'S LIVES 10:00 am 6:30 pm Fate MIA Shoes Risen Jeans Cozy Co. Like Love Mica Denim Tune in on Instagram & Facebook to see us live from 30A! Brand new styles & pieces hand-picked from Market! @THEBLACKSHEEPBOUTIQUETUPELO'.
Photo by Elisa Araceli Vega in 30A with @santos_medrano__9. May be an image of one or more people and text.

caption.text:
🍦 30A SWEET TREATS YOU NEED

• 🍨 @bluemountaincreamery – Homemade ice cream that hits every time
• 🍩 @donuthole – Iconic desserts and massive slices of pie
• 🍦 @pecanjacks – Small-batch ice cream with super rich flavors
• 🍌 @nigelsbananas – Chocolate-covered frozen bananas done right
• 🍫 @kilwins – Fudge, caramel apples, and all the classic sweets

#santarosabeach #30afoodie #30alife #emeraldcoastfl #30aeats

carousel_media.accessibility_caption: Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of gelato, ice cream and text that says 'ASID ATERSO 30A B0AFLO FLORIDA sweettreats sweet treats'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of gelato, ice cream and text that says 'Bluę Mountain Beach Creamery A must-stop for homemade ice cream after the beach. What to order: Waffle cone with any house- house-made flavor-classic flavor -classic 30A treat.'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of fritter, bagel, powdered sugar and text that says 'The Donut I lole Iconic bakery with huge portions and nostalgic vibes. What to order: Key lime pie or classic donuts both legendary. the Donut (8 Inl Florida Florida 8824 tin, Beach,'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of gelato, pecans and text that says 'Jac Pecan Jacks Small-batch ice cream shop with super creamy, rich flavors. What to order: Butter pecan or waffle cone-fan cone- fan favorites.'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of gelato, banana, plantains and text that says 'HAHAS PANCYDARANAD HAHAO Nigel's Bananas a Fun dessert stop known for chocolate-dippec e-dippec frozen bananas. What to order: Frozen banana with toppings- simple but iconic.'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of eclair, fudge, bread and text that says 'Kilwins Classic sweets shop with fudge, caramel apples, and ice cream. What to order: Fresh fudge or caramel apple- made in-store.'.

Photo by 30A REALTOR- Amy Willis Pecht on April 20, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, makeup, magazine and text that says 'For more info on local finds, family- friendly ly activities, client wins, real estate content, and all things 30A, FL be sure to hit that follow button!'.

caption.text: Been planning this trip since 2020 — obsessed with @raganharden to say the least! Truly nobody easier to celebrate!!🌴👙🫧🩵🍪

caption.text:
If your mother treated you like competition instead of a child… this may explain a lot.

1. She criticizes your looks when you’re feeling good about yourself.�Because your confidence triggers her insecurity.
2. She minimized your wins or didn’t acknowledge them in the first place.�Achievements got silence, sarcasm, or sudden drama that made you feel worthless & unloved.
3. She copied you after mocking you.�Her fist instinct was to tear you down & then make it hers.
4. She was jealous of the attention you got & would try to steal it or belittle it.�You were not allowed to matter more than her.
5. She compared your body, age, or success to hers.�A child should never be put in that role.
6. She sabotaged milestones.�Birthdays, weddings, graduations, moves, pregnancies suddenly became about her.
7. She punished independence.�The more you show up as yourself, the meaner she became.
8. She made you feel guilty for outgrowing her control.�And would guilt you for not falling for her emotional manipulation.

Comment “Journal” to get the Inner Child Journal to get the questions I ask during sessions to uncover your childhood wound & get practical tools for working through your childhood trauma.

**************************************************
Not therapy. Content based on my own personal views, experiences & study.
#childhoodtrauma #traumasurvivor #innerchildwork #narcawareness #narcabuse
